description:
Operating Area: France, Corsica, Marseille

The 70-foot YYacht Model Y7, aptly named MYSTIC, is a dream come true for both seasoned sailors and newcomers alike. YYachts achieved their aim for simplicity yet elegance with this magnificent sailing yacht which has been kept approachable, performance-oriented and comparatively easy to manage. MYSTIC boasts state-of-the-art sailing technology amongst other high-quality technology on board such as Starlink.

Her sheltered cockpit has been crafted, alike the rest of the vessel, with high-end materials and provides ample space. It is spacious and comfortable, inviting you to relax and dine "al fresco" while enjoying the sunsets over the Mediterranean. For more adventurous guests, the cockpit serves as the perfect vantage point to experience the exhilaration of sailing.

Within MYSTIC’s interior, designed by Norm Architects, the colour tones are dominated by light fabrics and woods - giving the interior a timeless and modern touch. The abundance of windows, along with the integrated lighting, fills her with sunlight and contributes to the expansive ambiance of this yacht.

Guests are accommodated in a master cabin and a twin cabin, each equipped with private bathrooms. The cabins have a tasteful colour palette that harmonizes with the rest of the overall interior and offer a comfortable amount of space for guests to unwind and unpack their belongings. MYSTIC can be hired by up to 4 guests, maximum 5 with an additional child.

crew.name: Léo Waroquier
crew.bio:
Description:

Sail and Work Experience
Léo’s many cruises on sailing boats and his experience in yachting has given him a wealth of experience in the maritime world. Having worked as a crew member for yacht charter guests for 8 years, Léo is especially skilled with ship maintenance, mechanics, painting, mooring, seamanship, sailing manoeuvres, use and mastery of navigation equipment, team management and manoeuvres at the helm. Léo is approachable, passionate about his role, and speaks 3 languages!

Job Description
Léo oversees the navigation, general operations, and financial management of the vessel, as well as the well-being of both the crew and guests. He maintains the yacht's efficient functioning at all times, ensuring strict compliance with hazard protocols and regulations. He further takes care of adhering to flag regulations, port state laws, and local regulations, managing the crew to guarantee full comprehension and compliance with the vessel's policies. In delegating tasks and supervising the crew's activities, he fosters teamwork and personalised growth.

Licenses & Certificates
250 Kw Mechanic's Certificate (A.C.P.M, Marseille)
Captain's Certificate 200 (ACPM, Marseille)
STCW 95 Safety Training (I.N.S.E.I.T, Nice)
Certificate of Competence in Small Craft Handling (I.N.S.E.I.T, Nice)
Maritime Radio Operator Certificate (I.N.S.E.I.T, Nice)

crew.name: Léa BAILLEY
crew.bio:
Sail & Work Experience
Prior to stepping on board MYSTIC, Léa has a strong background in client-facing roles including restaurant service, bar work, and restaurant management at LA TAVERNE in Strasbourg. She has also worked in several positions involving customer service and team coordination. Prior to entering the yachting industry, Léa trained and worked professionally as an osteopath in clinics in Marseille, Cogolin, and La Croix-Valmer, demonstrating responsibility, autonomy, and strong interpersonal skills. 

Job Description
Léa assists with the daily operation of the yacht both on deck and in guest areas. Her responsibilities include supporting sailing manoeuvres, maintaining deck equipment, and ensuring the vessel remains clean and organised. She also contributes to guest hospitality by preparing meals, assisting with service, and ensuring guests enjoy a comfortable and welcoming experience on board. She works closely with the captain and crew to maintain safety, efficiency, and high service standards during charters.

Licences and Qualifications
• Certificat de Matelot de Pont – Institut Maritime de l’Esterel (2025)
• Certificat de Formation de Base à la Sécurité (CFBS) – INSEIT Nice (2025)
• Diplôme d’Ostéopathie – Collège Ostéopathique de Strasbourg (2017–2022)
• Licence Ingénierie de la Santé, option ergonomie – Université de Lorraine (2017)
• Baccalauréat général série S, option S.V.T. – Lycée Henri Poincaré, Nancy (2013)
